chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 291 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. for order on office objection No.9 and 25. 2. For order on CMA No. 1209/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For orders on CMA No. 1210/2024 (Stay) 15.01.2026 None present This matter is pending since 2024 without any progress, even notice has not been issued. Applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the Applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad PS
